reasoning: The control SC-7(16) focuses on boundary protection to prevent the discovery of system components. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to network security practices that restrict unauthorized access and exposure of services. NetworkPolicies can enforce ingress and egress restrictions to prevent unauthorized discovery and access. Additionally, using service types that do not expose services directly to the internet (e.g., avoiding NodePort) and ensuring TLS is enabled for Ingress controllers further enhances boundary protection.
